title: free walking study
description: A mobile EEG study examining gait-related artifacts during naturalistic walking behavior. Nineteen participants completed outdoor walking tasks along two different routes, with repeated trials including a self-paced button-pressing condition. This dataset provides empirical characterization of movement-related noise in mobile neuroimaging recordings during unconstrained locomotion. This dataset is sourced from OpenNeuro (ds003039.v1.0.2) and has been republished on NEMAR.
methods_description: Mobile EEG recordings were collected from 19 participants during free walking outdoors. Subjects walked two different routes, each traversed twice—once with self-paced button pressing and once without. Detailed methodological information is provided in the associated publication (Jacobsen et al., 2020). This dataset originates from OpenNeuro dataset ds003039.v1.0.2.
